creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
Adding -DPython3_EXECUTABLE=${PYTHON_CMD} to CMAKE_ARGS seems to do the trick.

This might be considered a bug in the cmake support in Uses/python.mk (Python_ADDITIONAL_VERSIONS did not seem to help - maybe because of changes over the years to the "FindPython" infrastructure in cmake).  Maybe Python3_EXECUTABLE should be added in python.mk

python@ CC'd for input.
